title: crataegus crus-galli var. ovalifolia
intro: Crataegus crus-galli var. ovalifolia, also known as the Chinese Hawthorn, is a variety of the Chinese hawthorn tree, scientifically classified under the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is rich in flavonoids, anthocyanins, and other bioactive compounds, which are responsible for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and protecting against oxidative stress. The Chinese Hawthorn can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and decoctions, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for promoting overall well-being.
